prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to permits issued by the Environment Agency, which operates in England. The Industrial Emissions Directive is administered separately in Scotland through the Scottish Environment Protection Agency (SEPA), making this document not applicable to Scotland.
